# UniFi Mobility v0.5.1

## 中文

- 在主分支 HACS 与 Hassfest 校验成功后发布，用于申请加入 HACS 默认仓库。
- 包含 v0.5.0 的诊断、固件兼容、IPv6 和 HACS 发布改进。

## English

- Published after successful HACS and Hassfest validation for submission to the
  HACS default repository.
- Includes the diagnostics, firmware compatibility, IPv6, and HACS publishing
  improvements from v0.5.0.
